query_intent: Summarize a 14-day window starting 2000-08-19 by channel and channel entity (store, catalog page, web site), reporting sales, returns, and net profit after losses, with rollup subtotals.

dag_nodes.intent: Combine store sales and store returns into a single stream, align to the date window, and aggregate sales, returns, profit, and net-loss amounts per store id.
Combine catalog sales and catalog returns into a single stream, align to the date window, and aggregate sales, returns, profit, and net-loss amounts per catalog page id.
Combine web sales with matching web returns, align to the date window, and aggregate sales, returns, profit, and net-loss amounts per web site id.
Union channel-level aggregates, derive net profit as profit minus loss, and produce grouped totals with rollup across channel and channel-specific id.
